display.purpose: Hero headlines only — light weight, tight line-height.

body.purpose: All prose, descriptions, methodology. 65-75ch max line length.

label.purpose: Metric labels, scenario headers, table headers. Uppercase with tracking.

shadows.name: ambient-modal
shadows.purpose: Only shadow in the system — modal backdrop depth cue.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover and state transitions (150ms).

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Card hover lift and product image scale transitions (400ms).

components.name: Primary Button (Hero CTA)
components.description: Hero section call-to-action. Translucent on dark backgrounds.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; padding: 16px 36px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); color: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-radius: 6px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-decoration: none; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00c896; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: Data display card for environmental metrics. Large value, equivalences, progress bar.
components.html:
🌍 CARBON FOOTPRINT
14.8 kg CO₂eq
≈ driving 61 km
components.css: .ds-metric-card { background: #1a1a1a; border: 1px solid #2a2a2a; border-radius: 12px; padding: 28px; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-metric-card:hover { border-color: #444; } .ds-metric-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 13px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #999; margin-bottom: 16px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-metric-value { font-size: 42px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.04em; margin-bottom: 4px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-metric-value.carbon { color: #f5a623; } .ds-metric-unit { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #999; letter-spacing: 0; } .ds-equivalence { margin-top: 10px; font-size: 14px; color: #999; } .ds-progress { width: 100%; height: 6px; background: #2a2a2a; border-radius: 3px; margin-top: 16px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-progress-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 3px; transition: width 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-progress-fill.carbon { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f5a623, #e8543d); }

components.name: Scenario Card (Landfill)
components.description: Split-view scenario card showing landfill impact. No side-border stripe.
components.html:
UNREGULATED DISPOSAL
14.8 kg CO₂eq
components.css: .ds-scenario-card { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.02); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.07); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; } .ds-scenario-card .ds-scenario-title { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-scenario-card.landfill .ds-scenario-title { color: #f4907c; } .ds-scenario-card .ds-scenario-value { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-scenario-card.landfill .ds-scenario-value { color: #f4907c; }

components.name: Product Selection Card
components.description: Interactive product selection card with photo, specs, and carbon preview.
components.html:
Product Name

20000mAh · 50W · 440g

14.8 kg CO₂eq
components.css: .ds-product-card { background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-product-card:hover { transform: translateY(-8px); box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); } .ds-product-img-wrap { aspect-ratio: 4/3; overflow: hidden; background: #fafafa; } .ds-product-img-wrap img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; padding: 32px; transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-product-card:hover img { transform: scale(1.06); } .ds-product-info { padding: 18px 20px; } .ds-product-name { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a1a; margin: 0 0 6px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-carbon-note { font-size: 13px; color: #00b98b; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: BOM Data Table
components.description: Bill of materials table from teardown data. Dense, industrial, scannable.
components.css: .ds-bom-wrap { overflow-x: auto; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 10px; } .ds-bom-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 12px; white-space: nowrap; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-bom-table th { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #999; font-weight: 600; font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 10px 12px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); position: sticky; top: 0; } .ds-bom-table td { padding: 9px 12px; color: #B8B8B8; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.03); } .ds-bom-table td:first-child { color: #60a5fa; font-weight: 500; } .ds-bom-table td:last-child { color: #fff; font-weight: 600; text-align: center; } .ds-bom-table tr:hover td { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); }

narrative.overview: batterytrace looks like a field investigator's report: raw data printed on near-black, methodology visible on the surface, numbers that don't need decoration to land. It is sober, precise, and urgent — the voice of someone who cracked open a power bank and catalogued what was inside.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black foundation with toxic-warning green as the sole accent voice
Single sans-serif family at varied weights; no display/body pairing
Flat surfaces by default; depth only through tonal layering, never blur
Data-first density: metric cards, tables, and citations are the vocabulary
Dark default with full light mode; both modes avoid warm-neutral backgrounds

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Toxic-warning green is the sole accent. No secondary palette, no decorative color.

rules.name: The No-Warm-Neutral Rule
rules.body: Neither dark mode nor light mode uses cream, sand, beige, or warm-tinted near-white backgrounds.

rules.name: The Single-Family Rule
rules.body: One sans-serif stack for everything. Variation comes from weight and size, not from font changes.

rules.name: The Tabular Numbers Rule
rules.body: All data values use font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No blur. No glassmorphism. No decorative shadows.

dos: Do use toxic-warning green at ≤10% of any surface
Do use tabular-nums on every data value that changes
Do translate every technical number into a concrete equivalence
Do keep citations visible — methodology is first-class
Do use text-wrap: balance on hero headlines
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left/right > 1px as colored accent)
Don't use glassmorphism, backdrop-filter blur, or frosted-glass effects
Don't use greenwashing aesthetics: no leaf icons, nature imagery, earthy palettes
Don't use cream, sand, beige, or warm-tinted near-white backgrounds
Don't animate CSS layout properties (width, height, padding, margin)
Don't use Inter, Roboto, or any downloaded font — system stack only
